payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Partial/edge-cropped medium-brown stained wooden cabinet door with visible wood grain and a recessed raised-panel profile, small round metal knob near the upper right, glossy finish with light wear; appears to be a lower kitchen cabinet under a countertop and is photographed from close range (approx. 0.8 m).
